since_last: 50% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.25%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.40% · Gold +1.63% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 50% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.25%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.25%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +5.80%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +5.80%, SKHY +5.25%, MU +4.99%, INTC +4.16%, AMAT +4.04%. Laggards: ADBE -2.76%, WDAY -2.29%, INTU -1.98%, DDOG -1.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.42% at $121.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
